task_text: Slice-1 implementation plan for the Flyer Marketing Agent. Build order + concrete components: flyer_generation skill rewritten as Creative Director; flyer_context_builder callable tool/plugin returning one structured FlyerBrief; deterministic FlyerBriefValidator (fact IDs/spans, required-fact authority, must_not_add); identity/state/audit/delivery/retries/danger gates stay Python. Resolves open decisions (spine storage, FlyerBrief schema, send-rate metric, flag names). Dormant/flag-gated rollout (FLYER_CREATIVE_DIRECTOR_ENABLED=0, routing shadow). Tests + offline oracle; reversible deploy; live-flip held for operator.
